name: @junggyubae/career-planner-card
description: Career planner Mind Card. Designed to run ONLY inside the career-planner project — it depends on that project's state/ goal/ action/ layout. Model: state (who you are) + goal (where you're going) → the card is the policy that produces action (discovery + applications). Build private career state via upload/interview, find PIs/labs at a target school, and generate tailored CV + SOP (LaTeX to PDF) grounded in that state.
